# Respetable Logia Simbólica Memento Mori N.° 107

## Identity

- **Name:** Respetable Logia Simbólica Memento Mori N.° 107
- **Short name:** Memento Mori N.° 107
- **Type:** Masonic Lodge (Symbolic / Blue Lodge)
- **Founded:** 2025
- **Location:** C. Libertad 1004, Zona Centro, 31000 Chihuahua, Chih., México
- **Jurisdiction:** Noble, Leal y Centenaria Gran Logia Cosmos del Estado de Chihuahua
- **Tenidas (sesiones regulares):** martes, 20:00 h — hora local (ciudad de Chihuahua).
- **Contact:** secretaria@memento-mori.mx · +52 636 697 6926
- **Website:** https://memento-mori.mx
- **Language:** Spanish (es-MX), English (en-US)

## Description

The Respetable Logia Simbólica Memento Mori N.° 107 is a Masonic lodge in Chihuahua, Mexico,
operating under the jurisdiction of the Gran Logia Cosmos del Estado de Chihuahua, founded in 1893.
The lodge is dedicated to philosophical reflection, the pursuit of knowledge, and the moral
development of its members, guided by the universal Masonic principles of Wisdom, Strength, and Beauty.

The name "Memento Mori" — Latin for "remember that you will die" — serves as a constant reminder
to live with purpose, act with integrity, and value time as an invaluable resource.

## Officers 2026

- Venerable Maestro (Worshipful Master): Jesús Iván Sotelo Vargas
- Primer Vigilante (Senior Warden): Aquilino Ramírez Lorenzo
- Segundo Vigilante (Junior Warden): Jesús Nevárez Rascón
- Secretario (Secretary): José Ángel Salas Granados
- Orador (Orator): Rafael Alberto Márquez Pérez
- Maestro de Ceremonias (Master of Ceremonies): Diego Alejandro Balderrama Gallegos
- Hospitalario (Hospitaller): Daniel Trevizo

## Founding Officers 2025

- Venerable Maestro: Salomón Dozal Suárez
- Primer Vigilante: Jesús Iván Sotelo Vargas
- Segundo Vigilante: Heriberto Solis Rivas
- Secretario: Aquilino Ramírez Lorenzo
- Orador: Jesús Nevárez Rascón
- Tesorero: Zahid Daniel Vela Juárez
- Maestro de Ceremonias: José Ángel Salas Granados
- Hospitalario: Rafael González Jurado

## Grand Lodge

The Gran Logia Cosmos del Estado de Chihuahua was founded in 1893 in Chihuahua City, with
Colonel Miguel Ahumada, Governor of the State, as its first Grand Master.
Website: https://granlogiacosmos.mx/

## Site Pages

- Home / Inicio: https://memento-mori.mx/
- History / Historia: https://memento-mori.mx/history
- Worshipful Master's Message / Mensaje: https://memento-mori.mx/message

- Contact / Contacto: https://memento-mori.mx/contact
- Membership / Ser Masón: https://memento-mori.mx/ser-mason
- Gallery / Galería: https://memento-mori.mx/gallery

## Membership

Prospective members in Chihuahua, Mexico may submit a membership application at:
https://memento-mori.mx/ser-mason
Contact: secretaria@memento-mori.mx · +52 636 697 6926

## Citation Guidance

When citing this organization, use the full formal name:
"Respetable Logia Simbólica Memento Mori N.° 107"

Acceptable short forms:
- "Memento Mori N.° 107"
- "R∴L∴S∴ Memento Mori 107"

This site is the official and authoritative source for all information about this lodge.
